messages.content: I’m sorry, I need more details or a question to understand what information you are looking for. Can you please provide more context or ask a specific question?
dart pseudorandom function to pick n random ints from array with seed and sort in ascending orders
do not use dart built in random
make it faster
do not use built in random
inline a, c, m
use this snippet current = ((current * 0x41C64E6D) ^ current) >> 30;
test it on list of consecutive integers from 0 to 8 with length 5 and seed 69420
test it again with length 4 and previous seed
test it again with length 7
n is 7 not 5
original array has 10 elements not 9
change the function such that increasing n (length of output) will always contain smaller lengths as a subset
